text:
INCIDENT REPORT #012
Facility: Plant 2 - Gary
Asset: Feed Pump FP-08
Severity: CRITICAL

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed a sharp rise in vibration amplitude
on the Feed Pump FP-08. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 6.6 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be seal degradation from age.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
